senses.gloss: a linear measure, ¹⁄₂₄ of a دِيرَا (dīrā), – one inch
a square measure, ¹⁄₂₄ of a فَدَّان (faddān) – 175.035 square meters
a dry measure, ¹⁄₃₂ of a قَدَح (qadaḥ), ¹⁄₂₅₆ of a كَيْلَة (kayla), ¹⁄₃₀₇₂ of a إِرْدَبّ (ʔirdabb) – 0.064 liters
a weight measure, ¹⁄₁₆ of a دِرْهَم (dirham), – 0.195 grams

etymology.text:
Etymology tree
Ancient Greek κεράτιον (kerátion)bor.
Arabic قيراط
Borrowed from Ancient Greek κεράτιον (kerátion, “carat, a Byzantine coin”).
